training_orientation.method: neutral fixtures are paired with exact home/away mirrors before fitting

simulation_policy.name: hybrid_classifier_poisson

nested_temporal_validation.description: Each outer year trains inner models only before the internal validation window, using orientation-invariant neutral fixtures, selects blend components plus classifier/Poisson/draw policy on that later internal window, then refits on all prior data and evaluates the outer year without retuning.

simulation_policy.description: Leakage-free nested-temporal selected classifier/Poisson policy with draw floor/ceiling guardrails; draw_xgb was removed because zero-weight inactive models are not SOTA/KISS.
